title: gilia leptantha subsp. salticola
intro: Gilia leptantha subsp. salticola, also known as Salt Lake gilia, is a flowering plant species belonging to the polemoniaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is said to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and providing relief from skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Salt Lake gilia are often used in teas, infusions, or topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
